name: vm-mcp
description: Native MCP control plane and skill package for VM orchestration on Proxmox/Xen.

interface.shortDescription: Run policy-guarded VM operations through MCP tools.
interface.longDescription: vm-mcp exposes production-focused VM lifecycle, guest execution, file operations, orchestration, backup, and observability tools through a native MCP server plus an operational skill for Codex.
defaultPrompt: Run vm_state status for VM 101 and summarize its current health.
Create a safe rollout plan using vm_snapshot, vm_config, and vm_state.
Fan out a read-only diagnostics command to a list of VM IDs.
